zh.title: 特斯拉预言全集 - 尼古拉·特斯拉对未来科技的16条预言与验证 | Tesla Prophecies
zh.description: 塞尔维亚裔美国发明家尼古拉·特斯拉（1856-1943）在采访、文章和专利中留下的16条关于未来科技的预言完整收录。涵盖智能手机、WiFi、无人机战争、可再生能源、机器人等领域，大量预言已被现代科技验证。

en.title: Tesla Prophecies - 16 Predictions from Nikola Tesla (1856-1943) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Serbian-American inventor Nikola Tesla (1856-1943) made 16 remarkable predictions about future technology in interviews, articles, and patents. Covering smartphones, WiFi, drone warfare, renewable energy, and robotics. Many have been verified by modern technology.
